nodes.label: Eric Davis (extended)
nodes.summary: Protégé of Hal Puthoff. Wrote 'Frontiers of Propulsion Science'. Published research papers on UAP tracking, quantum teleportation. Gave David Grusch all his briefing information which Grusch 'took and ran with.' Admiral Thomas Wilson's legendary meeting counterpart.

sources.quote: Frontiers of Propulsion Science author; Grusch's data source

nodes.label: George H.W. Bush (CIA Director)
nodes.summary: George H.W. Bush — during his tenure as CIA Director (1976-1977), per Eric Davis sources, was briefed on 'pretty spectacular information about a major UAP event that took place in early 60s' — Bush's eyes lit up, asked to see the film evidence.

sources.quote: Former CIA Director; briefed on UAP event during that tenure

nodes.label: Jay Stratton
nodes.summary: Former National Reconnaissance Office (NRO) liaison officer to the UAP Task Force. Introduced Eric Davis to David Grusch in the official information pathway.

sources.quote: Former NRO liaison to UAP Task Force; introduced Davis to Grusch

nodes.label: Frontiers of Propulsion Science
nodes.summary: Eric Davis's definitive textbook covering the comprehensive range of exotic propulsion and topological physics anomalies — standard reference.

sources.timestamp_end: Eric Davis's comprehensive exotic-propulsion overview book

nodes.label: Per Eric Davis sources: when George H.W. Bush was CIA Director, a Pentagon liaison officer briefed h
nodes.summary: Per Eric Davis sources: when George H.W. Bush was CIA Director, a Pentagon liaison officer briefed him on a major early-1960s UAP event — 'Bush's eyes lit up' and he demanded to see the film evidence.

sources.quote: George Bush when he was the CIA director was given some pretty spectacular information about a major UAP event that took place in early 60s. Bush's eyes lit up. He said, 'What are you talking about?' The Pentagon liaison officer told him all about it. He said, 'I want to see the evidence' — and the evidence was in the form of documentation, but the film was the primary thing.

type_specific.statement_text: Per Eric Davis sources: when George H.W. Bush was CIA Director, a Pentagon liaison officer briefed him on a major early-1960s UAP event — 'Bush's eyes lit up' and he demanded to see the film evidence.

nodes.label: Eric Davis gave David Grusch ALL of his AATIP / AAWSAP briefing data and information — 'Dave took th
nodes.summary: Eric Davis gave David Grusch ALL of his AATIP / AAWSAP briefing data and information — 'Dave took that and ran with it and he found everything.'

sources.quote: All I have was the stuff I accumulated and gathered going through the AAWSAP and AATIP. That's how I met Dave Grusch — Jay Stratton introduced me to Dave. I gave Dave all my data, all my briefing information, and he took that and ran with it and he found everything.

type_specific.statement_text: Eric Davis gave David Grusch ALL of his AATIP / AAWSAP briefing data and information — 'Dave took that and ran with it and he found everything.'

nodes.label: Eric Davis on willingness to testify before Congress: only in a CLASSIFIED setting under subpoena, w
nodes.summary: Eric Davis on willingness to testify before Congress: only in a CLASSIFIED setting under subpoena, with DoD pre-publication approval worked out — will not lie under oath (perjury); needs lawyer guidance for IC-retaliation protection.

sources.quote: The only way I'll testify actually the reality is in a classified setting. I would happily get advice from a lawyer first. DoD can come after me and the IC could come after me. They could prevent me from getting a job again by making sure that I don't get my security clearances.

type_specific.statement_text: Eric Davis on willingness to testify before Congress: only in a CLASSIFIED setting under subpoena, with DoD pre-publication approval worked out — will not lie under oath (perjury); needs lawyer guidance for IC-retaliation protection.

nodes.label: Per Eric Davis: BEFORE he ever testified, David Grusch was physically harassed at his home and in hi
nodes.summary: Per Eric Davis: BEFORE he ever testified, David Grusch was physically harassed at his home and in his vehicles; his wife was also harassed by NRO personnel; his PTSD medical records were illegally HIPAA-violated and leaked to media to attack his character.

sources.quote: What happened to Dave Grush physically harassed at his home and in his vehicles after he filed his whistleblower complaint. It was before he ever testified. He got harassed by someone in the NRO. Somebody leaked a PTSD episode he had — illegally violate the HIPAA law and release to news media.

type_specific.statement_text: Per Eric Davis: BEFORE he ever testified, David Grusch was physically harassed at his home and in his vehicles; his wife was also harassed by NRO personnel; his PTSD medical records were illegally HIPAA-violated and leaked to media to attack his character.

nodes.label: Eric Davis is the physicist / propulsion expert counterpart in the notorious 'Wilson-Davis Memo' — l
nodes.summary: Eric Davis is the physicist / propulsion expert counterpart in the notorious 'Wilson-Davis Memo' — leaked document of Admiral Thomas Wilson's exasperation upon discovering a black-budget private aerospace UFO reverse-engineering program.

sources.quote: The notorious Wilson memo, a leaked document describing a secret meeting occurring between Admiral Thomas Wilson and a physicist and propulsion expert named Eric Davis.

type_specific.statement_text: Eric Davis is the physicist / propulsion expert counterpart in the notorious 'Wilson-Davis Memo' — leaked document of Admiral Thomas Wilson's exasperation upon discovering a black-budget private aerospace UFO reverse-engineering program.
